title: Google AI Bootcamp Landing Page - Dark Theme
prompt:
Title: Google AI Bootcamp Landing Page - Dark Theme
Context: Landing page for GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026, a professional training program for office workers and marketers.
Description of the screen: A modern, high-conversion landing page for 'GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026'. 
- HERO: Bold headline 'CHINH PHỤC HỆ SINH THÁI GOOGLE AI 2026', sub-headline about building a virtual team, 3 key highlights (5 sessions, 30/70 formula, guaranteed products), and a prominent 'Đăng Ký Tham Gia Ngay' CTA button. Background features abstract AI/neural network elements with Google's brand colors (blue, red, yellow, green) as accents.
- PROBLEM SECTION: 'BẠN CÓ ĐANG KIỆT SỨC...?' with 4 cards detailing common workplace pain points like information overload and repetitive tasks.
- SOLUTION SECTION: 'BIẾN GOOGLE AI THÀNH CỘNG SỰ ĐẮC LỰC NHẤT' highlighting Gemini, NotebookLM, Whisk & Flow, and Opal & Workspace Studio.
- CURRICULUM: A clean vertical timeline or grid of 5 cards showing the 5-session roadmap from Gemini overview to Capstone project.
- OUTCOMES: 4 icons representing Virtual Staff, 70% Time Saved, AI Master Mindset, and Certification.
- FINAL CTA: 'SẴN SÀNG TRỞ THÀNH NHÂN SỰ CỦA TƯƠNG LAI?' with a large CTA button and a note about needing a laptop/Gmail. 
The theme is a sleek 'Dark Mode' (AI-tech style) with clean typography, professional spacing, and subtle Google-colored glow effects. Variant 1 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
